title: document that rebuild_chat_display must be called after every self.chats mutation
description: app.rs line 106: rebuild_chat_display has no doc comment. The chat_display field comment says 'updated whenever chats change', but there is no signal on the function itself saying it must be called every time self.chats is mutated. Any future code path that modifies self.chats without calling rebuild_chat_display will silently display stale labels in the UI — there is no compiler or lint enforcement. A doc comment on rebuild_chat_display stating 'Must be called after every mutation to self.chats to keep chat_display in sync' would make this obligation visible to contributors adding new mutation paths.
